stemHtml:
Given following information for a flight from London Heathrow to Cork ( EICK), what is the correct interpretation of the (1) weather, (2) cloud ceiling and (3) forecast for arrival at 13:10 UTC?

EICK 021300Z 17013KT 9999 VCSH SCT012 SCT015 BKN020 14/13 Q1017 NOSIG

options.a: (1) showers within 10 km of the aerodrome perimeter, (2) 1 200 ft, (3) no significant weather is expected in the next 2 hours.
options.b: (1) showers between 8 km and 16 km of the aerodrome reference point, (2) 2 000 ft, (3) no significant changes in the next 2 hours.
options.c: (1) showers within 8 km of the aerodrome reference point, (2) 1 200 ft, (3) no significant weather is expected in the next 2 hours.
options.d: (1) showers within 8 km of the aerodrome perimeter, (2) 2 000 ft, (3) no significant changes in next 1 hour.
